title: Impatiens delabathiana

intro: Impatiens delabathiana, commonly known as the Madagascar jewelweed or Balsam, is a species of flowering plant in the balsam family (Balsamaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with fever, wounds, and infections.
